close_reason: Updated LogReplayPhase to pass all survivors and added multi-source recovery to Shale
description:
## Goal
Change replay phase to pass all survivor logs to each replacement, enabling shard-filtered coalescing.

## File
`lib/bedrock/control_plane/director/recovery/log_replay_phase.ex`

## Current Behavior
Pairs new logs with old logs 1:1 for copying.

## New Behavior
- Pass all survivor log IDs to each replacement log
- Replacement log pulls from all and filters by shard index
- Same version range for all replacements

## Depends On
Task 1 (LogRecoveryPlanningPhase must provide survivor_log_ids)
title: Update LogReplayPhase to pass all survivors to replacements
